name: Altus Midstream Company
description: Altus Midstream Company was a pure-play, Permian Basin midstream company that owned gas gathering, processing, and transmission assets in the Delaware Basin. In February 2022, Altus Midstream completed its business combination with BCP Raptor Holdco LP (the parent company of EagleClaw Midstream) to form Kinetik Holdings Inc., a premier integrated midstream company operating in the Delaware Basin.
